Professional Services: AI Infrastructure & Backend Engineering
1. Core Competencies
• AI Agentic Workflows: Architecture of autonomous agents utilizing LangChain/Llama
frameworks.
• Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Docker-containerized deployments for environment
parity and portability.
• Database & RAG: Vector database configuration (Pinecone/PostgreSQL/pgvector) for
accurate LLM context retrieval.
• Backend Integration: Python-driven middleware for API authentication, rate-limiting,
and error handling.
2. Engineering Philosophy I prioritize scalability and maintainability. My deliverables consist
of modular, well-commented source code designed for future expansion, avoiding
proprietary "no-code" lock-in where custom logic is required for performance.
3. Engagement Model
1. Requirements Analysis: Definition of technical specifications and constraints.
2. System Architecture Design: Creation of data flow models and API specifications.
3. Implementation & Testing: Iterative deployment with rigorous unit validation.
4. Handover: Delivery of source code, deployment instructions, and documentation.
